wine_hotels.name: Royal Champagne Hotel & Spa
wine_hotels.address: 9 rue de la Republique, 51160 Champillon, France
wine_hotels.category: 5-star hotel and spa overlooking the vineyards
wine_hotels.description: A 19th-century coaching inn reborn as a 5-star hilltop retreat above the Marne vineyards at Champillon, with an infinity pool, spa and a Michelin-starred table.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Champagne pairing dinners; tasting flights of Cote des Blancs and Vallee de la Marne growers; guided house visits arranged from the concierge

wine_hotels.name: Domaine Les Crayeres
wine_hotels.description: A Pommery-built chateau set in a 7-hectare park in Reims, run as a 5-star Relais and Chateaux property. Home to the two-Michelin-star Le Parc, brasserie Le Jardin.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Champagne-pairing tasting menus at Le Parc; an extensive grower and grande marque list; bar flights of vintage cuvees

wine_hotels.name: Hostellerie La Briqueterie & Spa
wine_hotels.category: 5-star Relais and Chateaux hotel and spa
wine_hotels.description: A Relais and Chateaux hotel ringed by vineyards and gardens at Vinay, ten minutes from Epernay. Heated indoor pool and spa alongside the Michelin-starred Alcove.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Champagne pairing menus at Alcove; cellar list strong on Cote des Blancs; tastings and house visits arranged for guests

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Restaurant Les Avises
wine_hotels.description: Opened in 2011 by Corinne and Anselme Selosse of Domaine Jacques Selosse, this 10-room hotel sits among the grand cru Chardonnay of Avize. A single tasting menu.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Jacques Selosse grower-champagne flights; single set menu built for Cote des Blancs Chardonnay; estate visits for resident guests

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Jean Moet
wine_hotels.description: A 4-star hotel in a restored Epernay townhouse steps from the Avenue de Champagne. Wine bar and bistro on site, with the train station and the major house cellars.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Champagne bar pouring grower and house cuvees by the glass; cellar-visit bookings arranged at reception

wine_hotels.name: La Villa Eugene
wine_hotels.category: 5-star hotel on the Avenue de Champagne
wine_hotels.description: The only 5-star hotel on the Avenue de Champagne, in a 19th-century mansion once owned by the Mercier family. Fifteen rooms look over the avenue or the landscaped.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Champagne aperitifs in the salon and garden; concierge-arranged tastings and cellar visits along the avenue

wine_hotels.name: La Caserne Chanzy Hotel & Spa
wine_hotels.description: A 5-star Autograph Collection hotel beside Reims Cathedral, opened 2019 in a converted Art Deco building. Spa, restaurant and a champagne-focused bar a short walk.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Champagne bar list spanning grandes marques and growers; tasting events; cellar-visit concierge service

wine_hotels.name: Le Clos Corbier
wine_hotels.address: 5 boulevard Nicolas Francois Billecart, 51160 Mareuil-sur-Ay, France
wine_hotels.description: An 1850s Champagne family house turned guest house at Mareuil-sur-Ay, ringed by UNESCO-listed vineyards. The owners run cellar visits, tastings and a small table.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Cellar visits and tastings of the two family champagne brands; sabering and blind-tasting workshops led by in-house guides

wine_hotels.name: Parva Domus
wine_hotels.category: Bed and breakfast on the Avenue de Champagne
wine_hotels.description: A five-room bed and breakfast run by the Rimaire family on the Avenue de Champagne in Epernay, within walking distance of Moet & Chandon and Mercier.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Host-led champagne introductions; recommendations and bookings for the avenue house cellars

wine_hotels.name: Grand Hotel des Templiers
wine_hotels.description: A 4-star town-house hotel in central Reims, ten minutes on foot from the cathedral, with an indoor heated pool and sauna. A quiet base for visiting the city house.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Champagne service in the lounge; staff bookings for the nearby Saint-Nicaise house cellars

wine_hotels.name: Hotel de la Cloche
wine_hotels.description: A central Epernay hotel five minutes from the train station and the Moet & Chandon cellars. On-site restaurant serving French regional cooking, with the Avenue de.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Champagne by the glass at the bar; restaurant list of local houses and growers; cellar-visit suggestions at reception

wine_hotels.name: La Villa Saint Pierre
wine_hotels.description: A simple 14-room hotel in central Epernay, within walking distance of the Avenue de Champagne and the Moet & Chandon cellars. A value base for travellers touring.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Concierge bookings for Avenue de Champagne cellar visits; champagne recommendations from the hosts
